authors: S. H. Groves; R. N. Brown; C. R. Pidgeon
title: Interband Magnetoreflection and Band Structure of HgTe
source_parameter_uncertainty_semantics: published parameter errors reflect higher_band_parameter uncertainty; not pointwise Gaussian measurement covariance
